items.title: ‘I got a little insight…’ – Souness reveals Dubai moment that hints at why Cole Palmer didn’t make England squad
items.summary: GRAEME SOUNESS has revealed Cole Palmer gave him an "insight" into his character after seeing him act "extremely rude" to someone in a Dubai restaurant. The former Liverpool boss was asked about Thomas Tuchel's controversial decision to leave the Chelsea midfielder out of his final World Cup squad.
